steps.text: Let's find out about YOUR day. When do you wake up? Press the time that feels right for you!
You wake up and your day begins. Morning is the start of everything! When do you eat breakfast? Press it!
Breakfast gives you energy for the whole morning. After morning comes lunchtime.
Press the time you eat lunch!
After morning, lunch! The day is moving along. Then comes dinner.
Then dinner, as the sky gets darker. Last of all — bedtime.
Press when you go to sleep!
steps.feedback: Wake up, breakfast, lunch, dinner, bedtime — that is YOUR whole day!
